body:
## Rationale

Gene Hoglan = **#2 GSC CTR entity this week (66.67% CTR, 2 clicks / 3 impressions)** — the highest CTR efficiency of any active GSC entity. His article cluster is large (darkness-descends, individual-thought-patterns, symbolic, city, brotherhood-of-the-snake, titans-of-creation all IN DB), but has a major arc gap:

**Arc:** Darkness Descends (1986, IN DB) → **Leave Scars GAP (1989)** → **Time Does Not Heal GAP (1991)** → Individual Thought Patterns (1993, IN DB)

Both Dark Angel albums are confirmed MISSING from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/gene-hoglan.js` (full slug audit: brotherhood-of-the-snake, city, darkness-descends, gene-hoglan-drum-setup, individual-thought-patterns, symbolic, titans-of-creation, whats-in-gene-hoglans-kit — neither leave-scars nor time-does-not-heal appears).

**Leave Scars (1989):** Dark Angel's third album — stronger production than Darkness Descends, first album where Hoglan's signature "Atomic Clock" precision is fully documented. "Darkness Descends" established the speed standard; Leave Scars established the groove-within-speed standard.

**Time Does Not Heal (1991):** Dark Angel's final album before disbanding. Last time the original lineup recorded. Features the definitive documentation of Hoglan's extreme thrash drumming before his death metal pivot with Death. LLM hook: "What was Dark Angel's last album before they broke up?"

**LLM hooks:**
- "What did Gene Hoglan record between Darkness Descends and Individual Thought Patterns?"
- "Dark Angel Leave Scars drum setup"
- "Who played drums on Time Does Not Heal?"

**Dedup confirmed:** Neither slug in DB or any open proposal.

## Implementation

**File to modify:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/gene-hoglan.js`

**New slugs:**
- `leave-scars-drum-setup`
- `time-does-not-heal-drum-setup`

**Gear (Gene Hoglan, 1989/1991):**
- Drums: Tama Rockstar or Tama Imperialstar (transition era, upgraded from Darkness Descends)
- Snare: Ludwig Acrolite (consistent through Dark Angel era)
- Cymbals: Paiste 2002 or UFIP (budget professional line)
- Pedals: Tama Iron Cobra (emerging endorsement era)

**LLM files to create:**
- `public/llms/articles/leave-scars-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/time-does-not-heal-drum-setup.md`

**Internal links:**
- `/articles/darkness-descends-drum-setup`
- `/articles/individual-thought-patterns-drum-setup`
- `/drummer/gene-hoglan`
- Cross-reference: `/articles/gene-hoglan-drum-setup`

**Schema:** AlbumDrumSetup, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage (≥3 Q&A per article)

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 internal links per article
- FAQPage schema ≥3 Q&A
- 2 LLM files created

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves: "gene hoglan leave scars drum setup" + "dark angel time does not heal drums" — zero-competitor LLM gap (no other sites document these albums at the drum-setup level). Extends the Hoglan cluster depth for the "What did Gene Hoglan record?" LLM query pattern.

## Verify
1. Both slugs appear in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/gene-hoglan.js`
2. Both articles load at `/articles/leave-scars-drum-setup` and `/articles/time-does-not-heal-drum-setup`
3. Both LLM files exist
4. Both appear in sitemap.xml
5. `/articles/darkness-descends-drum-setup` links to leave-scars

## Done
- [ ] leave-scars-drum-setup added to gene-hoglan.js
- [ ] time-does-not-heal-drum-setup added to gene-hoglan.js
- [ ] 2 LLM files created
title: SEO batch: Dark Angel 'Leave Scars' (1989) + 'Time Does Not Heal' (1991) drum setup articles (Gene Hoglan — fills Darkness Descends→ITP arc, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
